overall.description: A player character rides a spectral mount through a dark, foggy fantasy landscape at night, approaching ancient stone ruins with a glowing entrance. The footage is from a video game with cinematic quality, featuring cool blue lighting and atmospheric mist.

tall wooden pole or post standing in the grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the rider moving through an open grassy field at night. Tall grass surrounds the path while a massive stone cliff face looms ahead in the distance. Sparse trees dot the landscape under a dark, foggy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: path alongside wooden fence approaching ancient ruins

events.description: wooden fence posts come into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path with ancient ruins becoming more prominent ahead

entered.detail: broken wooden fence posts and rails running alongside the path
large stone archway entrance of ancient ruins visible through the mist
ruined stone columns scattered in the grass

segments.scene_description: The rider moves along a dirt trail with wooden fence posts appearing on the right. The ancient stone ruins grow larger ahead, with an archway entrance becoming visible through the mist. The stone cliff face now flanks the left side as the open field gives way to a more enclosed path.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruin entrance with glowing doorway

events.description: green glowing light from the ruin entrance becomes visible illuminating the mist

agents.ego_description: approaching the illuminated entrance of the ancient stone structure

entered.detail: small flame torch burning on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The rider approaches the entrance of the ancient ruins, where a mysterious green glow emanates from within. The wooden fence runs alongside the right side of the path in the foreground, while broken stone pillars and rubble mark the approach to the doorway. The atmosphere grows denser with mist as the character nears the threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, foggy grassland toward the glowing threshold of ancient stone ruins. It begins with the rider traversing a wide field of tall grass under a dark sky, with a massive stone cliff face looming in the distance. As the rider follows a dirt trail, the open landscape narrows into an enclosed path flanked by the cliff on the left and wooden fence posts on the right, while the ruins grow larger through the mist. The scene then shifts toward the ruins' entrance, where broken stone pillars and rubble line the way. Finally, the camera approaches the doorway as a mysterious green glow emanates from within and the surrounding mist grows increasingly dense.
